headline: Alert from law firm on Clorox withdrawn

headline: Can PG's Cost Discipline Neutralize Weak Consumer Volumes?
summary: Procter & Gamble leans on cost control, productivity and supply-chain agility to offset inflation and protect margins, but weak volumes remain a challenge.
